prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年山东省综合类最低位次分别为 29496→30052→47689→38795→37499。2023 年出现明显断档（跳升至 47689），2024 年回弹至 38795，2025 年继续回弹至 37499，近两年回弹幅度收窄，2025 年较 2024 年前移约 1296 名，显示断档后的修复接近尾声；2021–2025 年本省综合类计划人数分别为 235→232→234→237→236，2026 年计划 237 人，较 2025 年增加 1 人，扩幅约 0.42%，计划基本持平，对竞争格局影响微弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连海事大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在 99–113 名之间（2026 年约第 113 名），属于中后段 211，层次定位清晰；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉文件中未被收录，无显著负面或正面声誉事件；抖音热度总排名第 50 位（评价"较热"），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度有一定基础但未达高热水平；投档异常数据中亦无该校记录，历史未出现断档或暴跌。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校理工类定位匹配；本省考 生总数从 2021 年 54.4 万持续增长至 2025 年 68.1 万，2026 年预计达 72.0 万（较 2025 年增加约 5.7%），考生规模扩大带来竞争加剧；大连海事大学位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；山东省为生源大省，跨省报考热度受学校层次、地域偏好等综合影 响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 37499、2026 年计划微扩 0.42%、本省考生总数增加约 5.7% 带来的竞争加剧效应，以及学校声誉平稳、抖音热度中等偏上的综合判断，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年略有前移（竞争加剧，位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约 37394 名，区间 36894–37894 名。

一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术、网络工程、智能科学与技术）
- 人工智能
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（36894–37894）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间上限（即小于 36894）时可重点冲击法学、计算机类等一档热门专业；位次接近区间下限（即大于 37894）时建议以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。大连海事大学为 211 理工类院校，工科专业整体就业前景较好，报考时建议结合个人兴趣与专业热度综合权衡。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were 29496→30052→47689→38795→37499. In 2023, there was a significant gap (jumping to 47689), rebounding to 38795 in 2024, and continuing to rebound to 37499 in 2025. The rebound amplitude has narrowed in the last two years, with 2025 moving forward by about 1296 places compared to 2024, indicating that the post-gap recovery is nearing completion. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for comprehensive subjects in this province were 235→232→234→237→236, with a plan of 237 for 2026, an increase of 1 person compared to 2025, an expansion of about 0.42%. The plan is basically stable, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian Maritime University is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science list has been stable between 99 and 113 in recent years (approximately 113th in 2026), placing it in the middle-to-lower segment of 211 universities, with a clear level positioning. The university has not been included in reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, with no significant negative or positive reputation events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 50th overall (rated as 'relatively hot'), with moderate-to-high short video exposure, indicating a certain level of application interest but not reaching high heat. There are no records of abnormal application data for this university, and no gaps or crashes have occurred historically.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's science and engineering orientation. The total number of examinees in this province has grown from 544,000 in 2021 to 681,000 in 2025, with an estimated 720,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 5.7% compared to 2025), leading to intensified competition due to the expanding examinee pool. Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference. Shandong Province is a major source of students, and cross-province application popularity is influenced by factors such as school level and regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 37499, a slight enrollment expansion of 0.42% in 2026, the intensified competition effect from an approximately 5.7% increase in the number of examinees in this province, and the overall assessment of stable school reputation and moderate-to-high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition intensifies, ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37394, with a range of 36894–37894.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (36894–37894), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (i.e., less than 36894), you can focus on popular Tier 1 majors such as Law and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (i.e., greater than 37894), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options while also considering Tier 2 medium majors. Dalian Maritime University is a 211 science and engineering institution, and its engineering majors generally have good employment prospects. When applying, it is recommended to balance personal interests with major popularity.
